prompt: Build a pydantic-ai agent that takes a user question about products, uses a tool to search a product database (just mock it with a dict), and returns a structured Pydantic model response with fields: product_name, price, and confidence_score (0-1 float). Include proper type annotations and docstrings on the tool.

assertions.text: Uses correct imports: Agent, RunContext from pydantic_ai and BaseModel from pydantic
Agent has output_type set to a BaseModel with product_name, price, and confidence_score fields
Uses @agent.tool or @agent.tool_plain decorator for tool registration
Tool function has a docstring with parameter descriptions
All functions have full type annotations (params and return types)
confidence_score field is constrained to 0-1 range (ge=0, le=1 or similar)
